question: Will the S&P 500 be between 6775 and 6799.9999 on Apr 9, 2026 at 4pm EDT?
reasoning: The S&P 500 closed at 6,782.81 on April 8, already within the target range of 6,775-6,799.9999. While geopolitical tensions around the Iran ceasefire create some volatility risk, the index would need to move significantly (either below 6,775 or above 6,800) to exit this narrow 25-point range in a single trading day. Historical daily volatility and the current positioning suggest a 75% probability of staying within range.
key_factors: Index already within target range at 6,782.81
risks: Iran ceasefire breakdown could cause sharp moves
Intraday volatility could push outside range
Trump deadline effects on market sentiment
Energy price shocks from Middle East tensions
